---
description: Run the installed oisin pipeline CLI for a task. Use when the user asks to run work-next or the oisin pipeline.
---

<!-- Generated by @oisincoveney/pipeline. -->
<!-- @oisincoveney/pipeline:host=codex -->
Codex currently does not support project-defined custom slash commands. Use this skill with:

```
/use work-next <ticket id or task description>
```

When invoked, run this command from the repository root, replacing the argument text with the requested task:

```sh
if [ -x ./node_modules/.bin/work-next ]; then   ./node_modules/.bin/work-next "<ticket id or task description>"; else   bunx @oisincoveney/pipeline work-next "<ticket id or task description>"; fi
```

Report the pipeline outcome and any failure evidence.
